meaning: adj.(瓷器)用戈斯氏瓷料制的
examples: Mr. Goss does not believe in any of this newfangled nonsense about lean meat.
Prentice saw Goss fall in behind the informer.
"We are taking every measure we can to protect employment," said Mike Goss, a Toyota spokesman.
The storm, a severe depression known as a "bomb", had not been forecast, said Mr Goss.
Mr. Cardin showed the utmost in cooperative leadership as the ranking member, along with Mr. Goss.
